subcodes.first_line: Praised be God, Who hath adorned the heaven of love with the stars of unity and harmony, and hath ordained that in the world of being marriage be the chief instrument
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی نور العالم بنیر لاح و اشرق من فجر الظهور فی افق سماء بیان الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for married couples, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @unity; oneness of humanity, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
